data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplification to reduce decision-making time for users.
data.technical_spec: Clear and concise categories for browsing.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing button sizes and positioning on the interface.
data.technical_spec: Primer buttons are larger and located centrally for easy access.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Reflecting the limited capacity of human memory.
data.technical_spec: Structured content is grouped under logical categories.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users expect your site to work the same way as others they already know.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: People remember uncompleted or interrupted tasks better.
data.technical_spec: Continue watching feature for resuming unfinished content with ease.
